steps.title: Read the contrast
steps.content: Some commentators praised ideologically aligned blogs for transparency. The observers after the blank criticized those blogs for promoting extremes and worsening polarization, so they are less optimistic than the first group.

steps.title: Choose the optimism word
steps.content: Choice A means stubbornly resistant. Choice B means sincere or serious. Choice D means hostile toward humanity. None captures the contrast between praise and skepticism. The remaining word means optimistic. The answer is C.
